facebook.caption:
POV: you take a wrong turn on Bãi Trường and end up at this.

InterContinental Phu Quoc Long Beach Resort. Beachfront. Rooftop bar. Multiple pools. 4.8 stars across 6,770 reviews.

The kind of place that makes you extend your trip by two nights. Chic rooms, direct beach access, and a rooftop setup that hits different at golden hour.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Rooftop bar, beachfront pools, and 6,770 people rating it 4.8 stars. Walking into InterContinental Phu Quoc Long Beach Resort for the first time looks exactly like this.
